name: revpro
description: Nginx reverse proxy manager with grouped sites.conf, ACME (Let's Encrypt) issuance + auto-renewal, and HTTP/3 support
author: Martin Skalicky

help.description: Manages nginx reverse proxy site configurations. Generates per-site configs from a site-configs.conf template, issues and auto-renews Let's Encrypt certificates via ACME (HTTP-01, lego), supports HTTP/3 and Authentik auth-proxy. Bundles TLS helpers (cert inspection, self-signed cert generation) and an HTTP/2,3 checker.

options.description: Generate per-site nginx configs from site-configs.conf
Clean, regenerate, then reload (--renew renews due certs first)
Append a site under ==domain.tld and generate+reload
List configured sites with resolved flags
Convert legacy site-configs.conf → sites.conf (backs up old)
Issue ACME certs for all sites (or named ones); covers domain + www.domain
Renew near-expiry certs then regenerate+reload; --daemon loops daily
Reload or restart the reverseproxy container
Wipe and recreate conf/ and logs/
Create the folder structure / open the config
Generate a self-signed root CA + server cert

examples.description: Issue Let's Encrypt certs for every site in the config
Run a renewal loop that auto-renews and reloads nginx
Show a live cert's expiry and issuer
